title: `brew install skopeo` failed on macOS BigSur
body:

comments.body: Thanks for your report. https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/ looks like a server maintained by, or for, Homebrew itself, so it’s not something we can directly influence. http://github.com/homebrew/homebrew-core/ might be the right place to report that.
I concur. There's nothing we can do upstream, unfortunately.
